name: slack-gif-creator
tagline: Generates Slack-optimized animated GIFs with PIL, using bundled GIFBuilder, validator, and easing utility modules.
verdict: Clean, safe, well-structured media skill: no network/exec/secret risk, concrete code examples, consistent Slack size/FPS/color specs. Weak spots: no out-of-scope guidance to prevent misfiring on generic GIF/image requests, no explicit handling when validation fails or PIL deps are missing, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: `pip install pillow imageio numpy` has no version pins; well-known packages from the default registry, so only a minor supply-chain gap.
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope guidance anywhere, risking misfire on generic GIF/animation or non-Slack image requests.
Validator example shows only the success branch (`if is_slack_ready('my.gif'):`) with no guidance for a failed check or missing PIL/imageio deps.
